texts.text: The work order in this status cannot modify the associated employee! Please consider rolling back or handing over the work order process.
It is not allowed to modify the emergency degree of the work order in this status! Please consider rolling back or handing over the work order process.
Estimated start time must be less than estimated end time!
It is not allowed to modify the estimated start time for a work order in this status!
It is not allowed to modify the estimated end time for a work order in this status!
Execution start time must be less than completion time!
The work order in this status is not allowed to perform the [confirm] operation!
The work order in this status is not allowed to perform the [assign] operation!
Work orders in this status are not allowed to execute [execute]!
The work order in this status is not allowed to perform the [complete] operation!
The work order in this status is not allowed to perform the [reject] operation!
Work orders in this status cannot be returned to {0} status!
Work orders in this status cannot be skip to {0} status！
